concepts.title: Arithmetic Series
concepts.conceptBody:
Sum of series

Arithmetic Series 

$\text{sin}a+\text{sin}\left( a+d \right)+\text{sin}\left( a+2d \right)+\ldots +\text{sin}\left( a+\left( n-1 \right)d \right)=\frac{\text{sin}\frac{nd}{2}}{\text{sin}\frac{d}{2}}\text{sin}\left( \frac{2a+\left( n-1 \right)d}{2} \right)$

$\text{cos}a+\text{cos}\left( a+d \right)+\text{cos}\left( a+2d \right)+\ldots +\text{cos}\left( a+\left( n-1 \right)d \right)=\frac{\text{sin}\frac{nd}{2}}{\text{sin}\frac{d}{2}}\text{cos}\left( \frac{2a+\left( n-1 \right)d}{2} \right)$

easier rule to remember : $\frac{\text{sin}\left( \text{n}\cdot \frac{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ difference }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }}{2} \right)}{\text{sin}\left( \frac{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ difference }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }}{2} \right)}\left( \text{sin} \right)$ or $\left( \text{cos} \right)\left( \frac{\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ first }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }+\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ last }\!\!~\!\!\text{ term }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }}{2} \right)$

concepts.title: Geometric Series
concepts.conceptBody:
Geometric Series 

$\text{cosAcos}2\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ Acos}4\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ A}\ldots \text{cos}{{2}^{\text{n}-1}}\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ A}=\frac{\text{sin}\left( {{2}^{\text{n}}}\text{A} \right)}{{{2}^{\text{n}}}\text{sinA}}$

Some more (which you can remember, if possible) 

  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ sin}\alpha +\text{sin}\beta +\text{sin}\gamma -\text{sin}\left( \alpha +\beta +\gamma \right)=4\text{sin}\frac{\alpha +\beta }{2}\text{sin}\frac{\beta +\gamma }{2}\text{sin}\frac{\gamma +\alpha }{2}$
  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ cos}\alpha +\text{cos}\beta +\text{cos}\gamma +\text{cos}\left( \alpha +\beta +\gamma \right)=4\text{cos}\frac{\alpha +\beta }{2}\text{cos}\frac{\beta +\gamma }{2}\text{cos}\frac{\gamma +\alpha }{2}$

concepts.title: Related identities to A+B+C=pi
concepts.conceptBody:
The angles of triangle and related identities

If $\mathbf{A}+\mathbf{B}+\mathbf{C}=\pi $, then : 

  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ sin}2\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ A}+\text{sin}2\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ B}+\text{sin}2\text{C}=4\text{sinAsinBsinC}$
  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ cos}2\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ A}+\text{cos}2\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ B}+\text{cos}2\text{C}=-1-4\text{cosAcosBcosC}$
  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ cosA}+\text{cosB}+\text{cosC}=1+4\text{sin}(A/2)\text{sin}(B/2)\text{sin}(C/2)$
  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ sinA}+\text{sinB}+\text{sinC}=4\text{cos}(A/2)\text{cos}(B/2)\text{cos}(C/2)$
  • $\text{tanA}+\text{tanB}+\text{tanC}=\text{tanAtanBtanC}$
  • $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ cotAcotB}+\text{cotBcotC}+\text{cotCcotA}=1$
  • $\text{tan}(A/2)\text{tan}(B/2)+\text{tan}(B/2)\text{tan}(C/2)+\text{tan}(C/2)\text{tan}(A/2)=1$
  • $\text{cot}(A/2)+\text{cot}(B/2)+\text{cot}(C/2)=\text{cot}(A/2)\text{cot}(B/2)\text{cot}(C/2)$

examples.title: If $x=\cos 10^{\circ} \cos 20^{\circ} \cos 40^{\circ}$, then the value of $x$ is
